doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents policy changes that contradict existing Florida statute, cites an unverifiable reference number, and misrepresents litigation outcomes—all consistent with a fabricated institutional document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document contradicts current Florida law (§98.0751 still requires LFO payment for rights restoration), references a nonexistent "FL DoE 2025-EC-07" memo, mischaracterizes the Jones v. DeSantis litigation outcome, and introduces policy changes (automatic LFO waiver, ban on LFO inquiries) that would require statutory amendment rather than a departmental clarification memo—hallmarks of a fabricated document.
